series_metadata.series_title: Supporting Documentation for Facilitation of Teaching Certificates for Prison Teachers
series_metadata.series_description: These records are files associated with the facilitation of teacher certifications for teachers who work in prisons. Aspiring teachers send supporting documentation which may include a history of employment, contact information, high school diploma, transcripts, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper in operating area imaged and indexed. Once confirmed paper copy has been checked accuracy, quality, and completeness ; Electronic: electronic record
